name: Galaxy IT — Pedido de Avaliacao Automatico (apos servico) [v2 R01 audit]

nodes.name: GHL - Enviar SMS
nodes.notes: Sends real SMS via GHL Conversations API. Requires the contact to have a phone and SMS-capable channel configured. Uses contact's existing GHL location for sender number.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: 'Follow-up: avaliacao ainda nao recebida', body: 'Cliente recebeu SMS + email automatico ha 3 dias. Se a avaliacao ainda nao chegou, ligar pessoalmente para agradecer pelo servico e pedir o review. Link: ' + $json.reviewLink, dueDate: new Date(Date.now() + 86400000).toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', sms_sent: true, email_sent: true, follow_up_in: '3 days' }) }}
